subcodes.title: Words to Ahmad Sohrab, spoken on 1915-05-09
subcodes.first_line: Many years ago this was a public well and the native women every morning and evening drew water. After a while the Germans made up their minds to take possession of it.
subcodes.first_line_orig: این چاه را بسته اند که مبادا سایرین از آبش استعمال کنند سبحان الله از مضرت بدیگران چه نتیجه
